title: Code for the paper "The Impact of Uncertainty Estimation on Radiomic Segmentation Reproducibility and Scan-Rescan Repeatability in Kidney MRI"
author: Damiano, Rossella
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The code for the uncertainty-aware segmentation of kidneys and for the extraction of radiomic features from renal T2w-MRI of healthy and pathological subjects is here available.  
 The segmentation method, as well as the radiomics procedure, are described in Damiano et al. "The Impact of Uncertainty Estimation on Radiomic Segmentation Reproducibility and Scan-Rescan Repeatability in Kidney MRI", Medical Physics, 2025. 52 (7), e17995.  https://doi.org/10.1002/mp.17995  
 The trained weights for segmentation models and the parameters used for radiomics computation are also available. 
 If you use this code, please cite the original publication.
steps_raw:
The code for the uncertainty-aware segmentation of kidneys and for the extraction of radiomic features from renal T2w-MRI of healthy and pathological subjects is here available.  
 The segmentation method, as well as the radiomics procedure, are described in Damiano et al. "The Impact of Uncertainty Estimation on Radiomic Segmentation Reproducibility and Scan-Rescan Repeatability in Kidney MRI", Medical Physics, 2025. 52 (7), e17995.  https://doi.org/10.1002/mp.17995  
 The trained weights for segmentation models and the parameters used for radiomics computation are also available. 
 If you use this code, please cite the original publication.
